title: Ceropegia loeseneriana
taxonomy: Ceropegia loeseneriana is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant is native to southern Africa and is part of the genus Ceropegia, which includes around 130 species of leafy vines and twining plants. The family Apocynaceae is a large and diverse group of plants that also includes milkweeds, oleanders, and periwinkles. The genus Ceropegia is known for its unique, hanging flowers and adaptability to arid environments. Ceropegia loeseneriana is further classified within the tribe Staplieae.
